arts.ttl: Empoli vs. AC Milan, both sides looking for a win
arts.sum: AC Milan have conceded in each of their last six league games, after keeping a clean sheet in four of the previous five; the last time the Rossoneri conceded in seven consecutive matches in a single Serie A season came between November 2022 and February 2023. AC Milan have won seven of their last eight Serie A games against Empoli (D1), scoring 18 goals in the process (2.3 on average) and conceding only three times.

arts.ttl: Milan’s Summer Transfer Strategy: From Leão to João Félix, Mendes’ Influence
arts.sum: Enthusiasm has returned to AC Milan following a significant January transfer window. The Rossoneri welcomed high-profile players like Kyle Walker, João Félix, and Santiago Giménez, along with promising youngsters Warren Bondo and Riccardo Sottil. Calciomercato report that this ambitious approach is set to continue into the summer, with super-agent Jorge Mendes playing a pivotal role. The post Milan’s Summer Transfer Strategy: From Leão to João Félix, Mendes’ Influence appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Abraham Between Milan and Roma: The Plan for a Permanent Move
arts.sum: Tammy Abraham has become a key figure in AC Milan's recent success, scoring a crucial brace against his former club Roma in the Coppa Italia. The English striker's performance has not only propelled Milan forward in the competition but has also ignited discussions about his long-term future with the Rossoneri. arts.sum: Christian Kouamé, Empoli's latest signing on loan from Fiorentina, was introduced to the press today. The Ivorian forward shared his thoughts on joining the club and his aspirations for the season ahead.
